title: Bootstrap: Cargo workspace + lexer port + empty kernel SPIR-V
goal: Produce a minimal end-to-end slice that proves the plumbing works: parse a tiny .axc file, tokenize it, emit a minimal valid SPIR-V module for an empty kernel, and validate with spirv-val.
scope_in: Cargo workspace with 7 empty crates (axc-lexer, axc-parser, axc-hir, axc-codegen, axc-optimize, axc-driver, axc-runtime)
Lexer: port from axiom-lexer with GPU keyword additions (@kernel, @workgroup, @subgroup_uniform, buffer, shared, barrier)
Minimal parser: @kernel function with @workgroup annotation and empty body
Minimal HIR: validates that @kernel has @workgroup annotation
Minimal codegen: rspirv direct emission of an empty kernel SPIR-V module (OpCapability Shader, OpEntryPoint GLCompute, OpExecutionMode LocalSize)
CI on GitHub Actions: cargo test + spirv-val on compiled fixtures
scope_out: Any GPU execution at runtime (Vulkan/OpenCL dispatch)
